[{"choices": [{"finish_reason": "stop", "index": 0, "logprobs": null, "message": {"annotations": null, "audio": null, "content": "[{\"bbox\": [308, 139, 1402, 286], \"category\": \"Text\", \"text\": \"concedere: et habiano per bene che io nadda a Roma et altri pegrinationi: Luie\\nvirte: et alto stato la sancta Trinita cõserui et accrescha. Data nele indie in la in-\\nsula di Janahica a. 7. di Julio del. 1503.\"}, {\"bbox\": [563, 294, 1131, 543], \"category\": \"Text\", \"text\": \"Stampata in Venetia (a nome\\nde Constantio Bayuera cita\\ndino di Bressa) per Si-\\nmone de Louere. a di\\n7. di Mago. 1505.\"}, {\"bbox\": [812, 534, 862, 578], \"category\": \"Picture\"}, {\"bbox\": [581, 610, 1114, 702], \"category\": \"Section-header\", \"text\": \"Cum Prinilegio.\"}, {\"bbox\": [315, 728, 1407, 825], \"category\": \"Text\", \"text\": \"Aduerte lectore a non legere Colúbo Vice Re di Spagna: ma legerai solü Vice\\nRe de le insule Indie.\"}, {\"bbox\": [597, 1660, 949, 1850], \"category\": \"Picture\"}]", "function_call": null, "reasoning": null, "refusal": null, "role": "assistant", "tool_calls": []}, "stop_reason": 151673, "token_ids": null}], "created": 1775515421, "id": "chatcmpl-9660431b96b8f126", "kv_transfer_params": null, "model": "davanstrien/dots.ocr-1.5", "object": "chat.completion", "prompt_logprobs": null, "prompt_token_ids": null, "service_tier": null, "system_fingerprint": null, "usage": {"completion_tokens": 368, "prompt_tokens": 4585, "prompt_tokens_details": null, "total_tokens": 4953}}]
